SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession. Note: Download sequence should be initiated only 10 secs after tool is connected

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

SESSION.NAME: supplierProgrammingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This session is used to grant special privileges to the module and vehicle manufacturers. Diagnostic session 61H is reserved only for use by developers and test tools in manufacturing and assembly plants. SupplierProgrammingSession runs in boot software and is used to enter Netloader/Fastboot mode.

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Could not register to available network
Call ended due to CCFT expiry

DTC_FAILURE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Circuit Short To Ground or Open

DTC_SNAPSHOT_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The first time since DTC information was cleared or the DTC was aged that DTC status bit 3 (confirmedDTC) is set to 1.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: TCU power on or on a reboot
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Accelerometer passes self-test Failure Criteria: Accelerometer cannot be communicated with after 5 attempts (500 ms apart), or accelerometer fails self-test.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Stolen Vehicle DTC alert will be generated and sent to V-SDN when Stolen Vehicle Service is active
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Vehicle movement not detected by SVSS/PTA components. Dead Reckoning will not track vehicle location accurately

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous until "VIN strategy" in 0xDE03 = 0x00b or "VIN strategy" in 0xDE03 = 0x11b with valid Conversion VIN
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: "VIN strategy" in 0xDE03 = 0x00b (OEM VIN) or "VIN strategy" in 0xDE03 = 0x11b (Customer Service Data (VIN)) with valid Conversion VIN Failure Criteria: "VIN strategy" in 0xDE03 = 0x11b (Customer Service Data (VIN)) and invalid Conversion VIN
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on. TCU will use OEM VIN (from BCM) for MSD sent to PSAP.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: VIN sent in MSD to PSAP may not be correct.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous detection (via SIM polling with STATUS command, issued at least every 30 sec. while in Idle state).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: SIM can be read, ICCID, IMSI EFs can be read. Failure Criteria: SIM Cannot be Read, ICCID, IMSI EFs cannot be read.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Emergency call may fail. Data over cellular will fail.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Emergency call may fail.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: CAN bus communication operational. Failure Criteria: CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: If emergency calling is enabled, LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Many TCU features, including emergency calling, will not be operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: Receive message 0x202 within 10 seconds Failure criteria: Fault detected when message 0x202 not received for more than 10s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU cannot use dead reckoning info to help determine the location of the vehicle.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: Message 0x3B3 and 0x40A (GGCC_Config_Mgmt_ID_1) does not go missing for more than 10s Failure criteria: when message 0x3B3 (BodyInfo_3) or 0x40A (GGCC_Config_Mgmt_ID_1) goes missing for more than the specified period of time
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU may not be able to place an emergency call. Dimming of LED may not be set correctly.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Serial Data Gateway "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: 195 seconds from AP bootup if power has already been applied to TCU, otherwise 240 seconds if TCU is being powered on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: TCU SOA client connected to ECG SOA broker; Failure Criteria: TCU SOA client not connected to ECG SOA broker.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Many vehicle features will not be operational.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Message 0x91 (YawData) and message 0x4C (RCMStatusMessage2 - All signals in message) not missing for more than 10 seconds; Failure Criteria: when RCM messages 0x91 (YawData) or 0x4C (RCMStatusMessage2) missing for more than 10 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Automatic emergency call activation may not occur.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: Message 0x2FD is received within 10 seconds; Failure criteria: Message 0x2FD is not received within 10 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: TCU will use default language settings configured.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Language of voice prompts may not align with user settings.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Vehicle Security Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Every interaction with the HSM. DTC raised when error persists for 3 consecutive interactions.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Hardware Security Module not faulty. Failure Criteria: Hardware Security Module is faulty.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: CV2X functionality will be disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous until VMCU software is updated
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Correct VMCU software is loaded so that HW variant is known, DTC is cleared. Failure Criteria: VMCU software does not recognize HW variant, DTC is active.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU is not fully operational

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts. Ignition is stable.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Valid value received from message 0x3B3. Failure Criteria: Invalid and/or unknown value received from message 0x3B3.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: If emergency calling enabled, LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU may not be able to place an emergency call.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Vehicle Security Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Every interaction with the HSM. DTC raised when error persists for 5 consecutive interactions.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Hardware Security Module not faulty. Failure Criteria: Hardware Security Module is faulty.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: CV2X functionality will be disabled

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts. Ignition is stable.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Valid value received in signal RstrnImpactEvntStatus. Failure Criteria: Invalid value received in signal RstrnImpactEvntStatus.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Automatic emergency call activation may not occur.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Link between MDM and VMCU is operational. Failure Criteria: Link between MDM and VMCU is not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: If emergency calling is enabled, LED will light until the fault clears
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Many TCU features, including emergency calling, will not be operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Modem/Application processor (SA515- AP) can communicate with the Extended Application processor (SA2150P- EAP). Failure Criteria: Modem/Application processor (SA515- AP) cannot communicate with the Extended Application processor (SA2150P- EAP).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: CV2X functionality will be disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: 31 min for persistent non-critical error Immediately for critical error
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Ford APN connection successful. Failure Criteria: Ford APN connection failure.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Vehicle has no cellular connectivity with the Ford network

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Ignition ON AND WHS and/or WiFi features started.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Wi-Fi chipset is successfully initialized. Failure Criteria: Wi-Fi chipset cannot be initialized for more than 3 consecutive TCU power on/off iterations or reboots.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wireless Hot Spot and Wifi connectivity will not be functional

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: ITS self-check passed. Failure Criteria: ITS self-test check failed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: CV2X functionality will be disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Ignition ON, then on every BSM transmission process. DTC raised when error persists for either one of these conditions: -- 75 consecutive minutes during one ignition off on cycle; -- 10 consecutive ignition on off cycles with no BSM transmission during any of these cycles.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: BSM is transmitted. Failure Criteria: BSM is not transmitted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: CV2X functionality will be disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Global Configuration File or HF Tuning Parameter File Miss-Configured
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous until valid files are loaded
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Valid audio tuning and voice prompt files present. Failure Criteria: TCU is missing audio tuning and/or voice prompt files. If DE02, AUDIO_TYPE or EECS_AT_VEHICLE_TYPE is not configured, this DTC will be set.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Occupants may not be able to hear any voice prompts, and/or PSAP operator during an emergency call.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Initial Method 2 Configuration Not Completed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: TCU has received initial configuration, with 0xDE00 optional Configuration State bit equal to 0 ("Content Configured"). Failure Criteria: TCU has not received initial configuration for 0xDE00; optional Configuration State bit set to 1 (Content Not Configured).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Emergency calls will not trigger, LED remains ON and no voice prompt shall be played until cleared / configured.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU operation not fully functional.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous until valid configuration is loaded
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Configuration is compatible with eCall capable TCU hardware variant. This includes EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE in 0xDE01 set to Disabled and SOS button is detected to not be present on the vehicle. Failure Criteria: One of the following conditions are true: -- EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE (0xDE01) is set to China eCall and not a China eCall TCU (based on TCU HW variant); -- EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE (0xDE01) is set to eCall and not an eCall TCU (based on TCU HW variant); -- EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE (0xDE01) is set to ERA-GLONASS and not an ERA-GLONASS TCU (based on TCU HW variant); -- EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE (0xDE01) is set to AVEC and not an AVEC TCU (based on TCU HW variant); -- EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE (0xDE01) is set to EU NG eCall and not an EU NG eCall TCU (based on TCU HW variant); -- EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE (0xDE01) is set to NA eCall and not a NA eCall TCU (based on TCU HW variant); -- TCU HW is eCall capable AND EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE set to Disabled and SOS button is detected to be present on the vehicle; -- TCU HW is eCall capable AND EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE set to Enabled AND MSD_VEHICLE_TYPE set to Not Configured (except for AVEC TCU); -- TCU HW is eCall capable AND EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE set to Enabled AND vehicle_Propulsion_Type set to Not Configured (except for AVEC TCU); -- EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE set to ERA-GLONASS while TCU_GNSS_ANTENNA = FALSE; -- TCU_GNSS_ANTENNA = TRUE and no GNSS antenna present (based on TCU HW variant); -- TCU HW is eCall capable AND EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE set to Enabled AND TCUBackupBattery (0xDE01) is set to Disabled; -- TCU_GNSS_ANTENNA (0xDE00) is false and GNSS_SOURCE (0xDE01 on ECG) is set to TCU AND EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE set to Enabled; -- TCU HW is eCall capable AND EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE set to Enabled AND "RF Section Enable" is set to Disabled (0x00); -- EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE (0xDE01) is not set to disabled (0x00) and the Cellular Radio Configuration State (0xCF04) reports Cellular Radio Off (0x00).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: If EMERGENCY_CALLING_MODE (0xDE01) is set to eCall, China eCall, ERA-GLONASS, or EU NG, LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Vehicle features (emergency calling, location services) may not be fully operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous until valid configuration is loaded
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: TCU configuration is compatible with HW variant and is complete for critical features. Failure Criteria: Fault is set when: TCU_GNSS_ANTENNA (0xDE00) is TRUE and no GNSS antenna present (based on TCU HW variant); TCUBackupBattery (0xDE01) is set to Disabled with backup battery present (based on TCU HW variant); TCUBackupBattery (0xDE01) is set to Enabled with no backup battery present (based on TCU HW variant); SVS_BACKUP_ANTENNA_SETUP (0xDE00) is set to No SVS Antenna configuration with backup antenna present (based on TCU HW variant), AND the SVS antenna does not have an "open circuit" status detected; SVS_BACKUP_ANTENNA_SETUP (0xDE00) is set to an antenna configuration (it is not set to No SVS Antenna) with no backup antenna present (based on TCU HW variant); TCU_GNSS_ANTENNA (0xDE00) is false; GNSS_SOURCE (0xDE01 on ECG) is not set to TCU (based on non-China TCU HW variant); GNSS_SOURCE (0xDE01 on ECG) is set to TCU (based on China TCU HW variant); CV2X_Capability (DID 0xDE00) is set to CV2X Capable TCU but not a CV2X capable TCU (based on TCU HW variant); DID 0xDE10 if any of "X Position of GNSS Antenna in the CV2X Antenna Coordinate System" OR "Y Position of GNSS Antenna in the CV2X Antenna Coordinate System" OR "Z Position of GNSS Antenna in the CV2X Antenna Coordinate System" are set to 0 (if the TCU HW variant is a CV2X capable TCU); DID 0xDE10 if any of "Vehicle Length" OR "Vehicle Width" are set to 0 (if the TCU HW variant is a CV2X capable TCU); DID 0xDE11 if any of "Roll" or "Pitch" or "Yaw" are set to the default value of 360.1 (0xE11).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Vehicle features (stolen vehicle, location services) may not be fully operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous until valid configuration is loaded
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: TCU configuration is compatible with HW variant and is complete for support of the China Data Monitor feature. Fault is set when: China xEV Data Monitor feature is activated with no TCU backup battery (based on TCU HW variant) This is checked only when the China xEV Data Monitor feature is enabled via the ECG, which is typically after the factory EOL process
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU could continue operating but operation during backup battery scenario will fail

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: When OVTP Key manager session is open ends with the OVTP key manager session close on the server
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Successful execution of Key Manager Backup EGKT function FID 0x15 on the server. Fail Criteria: Error/NRC during execution of Key Manager Backup EGKT function FID 0x15 on the server.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: When OVTP Key manager session is open ends with the OVTP key manager session close on the server
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Key Manager Application reports successful execution of the key management function. Fail Criteria: Key Manager Application reports error during execution of the key management function.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: The number of authentication failure notifications from the SecOC component are less than the Authentication Error Threshold within the Authentication Monitor Time Window, the test shall be considered as Pass. Fail Criteria: the number of authentication failure notifications from the SecOC component are equal to or greater than Authentication Error Threshold within the Authentication Monitor Time Window, the test shall be considered as Fail. Note: The number of authentication failures accumulated and elapsed monitor time shall be set to 0 upon Pass Criteria or Fail criteria being satisfied, or upon DTC Clear being executed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: When OVTP Key manager session is open ends with the OVTP key manager session close on the server
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Self-test success notification from the Client Key Manager application. Fail Criteria: Self-test fail notification from the Client Key Manager application.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: ECU-SKIST status is not set to 0x00 (ECU-SKIST != 0x00). Fail Criteria ECU-SKIST status is set to 0x00 (ECU-SKIST == 0x00).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: the number of authentication failure notifications from the SecOC/FVM component are less than the FVM Authentication Error Threshold within the Authentication Monitor Time Window, the test shall be considered as Pass. Fail Criteria: the number of authentication failure notifications from the SecOC/FVM component are equal to or greater than FVM Authentication Error Threshold within the Authentication Monitor Time Window, the test shall be considered as Fail Note: The number of authentication failures accumulated and elapsed monitor time shall be set to 0 upon Pass Criteria or Fail criteria being satisfied, or upon DTC Clear being executed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Successful reception of Valid TripResetSyncMessage. Fail Criteria: No Valid TripResetSyncMessage for 3000ms and ECU is not in SLEEP/CAN OFF state. Note: DTC shall be restricted from setting/triggering for 2000ms upon transitioning from vehicle key position of OFF (i.e., IGN = OFF to IGN != OFF).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: On TCU bootup
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous until valid configuration is loaded
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: TCU configuration database is not corrupted. Failure Criteria: TCU configuration database is found to be corrupted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Vehicle features may not be fully operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run, Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Modem processor on TCU is operational. Failure Criteria: Modem processor on TCU is not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: LED will light after self-diagnosis at ignition on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Vehicle features may not be fully operational due to no cellular connectivity.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Ethernet connectivity is operational on TCU. Failure Criteria: Ethernet connectivity is not operational on TCU.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Many vehicle features will not be operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous until valid key can be loaded
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Key(s) can be successfully retrieved. Failure Criteria: Key(s) cannot be retrieved.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU cannot communicate with Ford SDN.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: 240 seconds from AP bootup if power has already been applied to TCU, otherwise 760 seconds if TCU is being powered on.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: VMCU detects that the Application processor on TCU is operational * within 240 seconds f the TCU already has power; * within 760 seconds from a cold restart (power being applied); Fail Criteria: VMCU has not detected that the Application processor on TCU is operational * after 240 seconds if the TCU already has power; * after 760 seconds from a cold restart (power being applied).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any operation that relies on TCU will not be possible (e.g. emergency calling, communication with network).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: When any of these events occur: - Ignition OFFON; - Load a token; - Remove a token; - Every 24 hours; - Power OFF->ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: No token exists on TCU; Failure Criteria: Any token exists on TCU. (note: ap_logging token doesnt raise the DTC in current implementation)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: None

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run. Vbatt is above (LO_BATT_THRESHOLD - 1) volts and below 17 volts
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: The "eth0" network interface has an IP address. Fail Criteria: The "eth0" network interface does not have an IP address.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Many vehicle features will not be operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: when Battery Voltage is Above (>) LO_BATT_THRESHOLD (configurable via DID FD06). Failure Criteria:when Battery Voltage is Below (<) (LO_BATT_THRESHOLD-BATT_HYSTERESIS) (configurable via DID FD06) for greater than 5sec (timing also configurable via DID FD06).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Normal operating conditions shall begin to shut down
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU operation not fully functional.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria:when Battery Voltage is Below (<) HI_BATT_THRESHOLD (configurable via DID FD06) Failure Criteria:when Battery Voltage is Above (>)(HI_BATT_THRESHOLD+BATT_HYSTERESIS) (configurable via DID FD06) for 5sec (timing also configurable via DID FD06)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Normal operating conditions shall begin to shut down.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TCU operation not fully functional.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in RUN. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: When the maximum number of Caterpillar keys provisioning sessions have occurred.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: CV2X Caterpillar keys provisioned. Failure Criteria: CV2X Caterpillar keys not provisioned.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: CV2X functionality will be disabled

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present
